title: store.rs precondition doc cross-references validate_member_patch by name
description: store.rs upsert_space_member_with_role doc says 'See validate_member_patch in jmap.rs'. If that function is renamed or the validation moves, the store doc becomes silently wrong — a contributor reading the store in isolation would follow a dead pointer. The store should document its own precondition inline ('role must be one of admin/moderator/member') without referencing a specific function in another module. Fix: replace the cross-reference sentence with an inline statement of the invariant.
